title: myoporum tetrandrum
intro: Myoporum tetrandrum, also known as the Australian box or trailing myoporum, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Myoporum tetrandrum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and promoting healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves or stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
